## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Docker or deployment behavior validated when relevant

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes when useful.

If screenshots are included, confirm they do not expose:

- real hostnames
- real account IDs
- real DNS records
- private machine paths
- credentials or tokens

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you want reviewers to pay special attention to.
